closure_rules.rule: Generic stamped claims are not canonical parent identity. They require exact stamp label evidence before any write package can include them.
Battle Academy deck marks are display/deck metadata. They do not create child finish rows and do not use finish_key=stamped.

closed_rows.future_reopen_condition: Reopen only if an exact independent source proves the stamped identity label for this set/card/number.
